title: Quick Start
content:
# Quick Start

Follow these steps to run the Kecare blog locally in just a few minutes.

## Prerequisites

| Requirement | Description | Verification Command |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Node.js | Install dependencies, start development server | `node -v` |
| Git | Clone theme repository | `git --version` |

## Install CLI

```bash
npm create kecare@beta
```

Verification of Installation:

```bash
kecare -version
```

## Get Topic

```bash
git clone https://github.com/Pamperkyumi/Kecare-theme.git
cd Kecare-theme
```

## Install Dependencies

::: tabs

@tab bun

```bash
bun install
```

@tab npm

```bash
npm install 
```
@tab pnpm

```bash
pnpm install 
```

:::

## Run

### Generate Site

```bash
kecare gen .
```

### Start Development Server

::: tabs

@tab bun

```bash
bun run dev 
```

@tab npm

```bash
npm run dev
```

@tab pnpm

```bash
pnpm run dev
```

:::

Visit http://localhost:3000 to view the site.

## Update

```bash
npm update kecare@beta
```
